summary: Web application project using an HTML/CSS/JavaScript frontend and a Python/Django backend.
architectural_notes: Tech stack defined: frontend uses HTML/CSS/JavaScript; backend uses Python with Django.

existing_features.title: Treat the user request to change the frontend to plain HTML/CSS/JavaScript and the backend to Python/Django as a non-actionable request within this project, and add a clear, user-facing notice in the UI (footer) stating that the deployed application runs on the Internet Computer with a Motoko backend and a React-based frontend.
